themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: President Donald Trump's state visit to China and his administration's policies continue to dominate right-wing media narratives across multiple countries. Coverage focuses on trade negotiations, Iran tensions, and domestic policy shifts, reflecting Trump's ongoing influence on global right-wing agendas.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump's China visit, trade talks with Xi Jinping, and Iran policy discussions.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Polish media highlights Trump's influence on PiS policies and Ziobro's US visit.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian outlets discuss Trump's impact on Italy's foreign policy and energy strategies.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Argentine media covers Trump's economic policies and their parallels with Milei's reforms.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: French far-right media analyzes Trump's diplomatic strategies and their relevance to RN's platform.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: UK media discusses Trump's policies as a model for Reform UK's domestic agenda.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe and the Americas are intensifying their focus on 'national priority' policies, emphasizing stricter immigration controls, welfare chauvinism, and opposition to multiculturalism. This theme reflects a broader transnational trend of prioritizing native populations in public services and economic opportunities.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox campaigns on 'Spain first' policies, targeting immigration and regional autonomy in Andalusia elections.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian far-right parties advocate for national priority in welfare and immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Swedish Democrats push for welfare chauvinism and stricter immigration controls.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN emphasizes French national priority in economic and social policies, clashing with Mbappé.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Norwegian Progress Party advocates for stricter immigration policies and national priority in welfare.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Milei's party proposes national priority in Argentine social programs and economic policies.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Corruption allegations are undermining far-right governments and parties across multiple countries. From Argentina's Milei administration to Poland's PiS and Hungary's Fidesz, these scandals are eroding public trust and reshaping political landscapes, with opposition parties capitalizing on the controversies.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Manuel Adorni and his brother face illicit enrichment investigations, damaging Milei's anti-corruption image.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: New Hungarian government audits Orbán-era corruption, signaling a break with past practices.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Ziobro's US escape and PiS's internal corruption allegations dominate Polish media.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox faces internal conflicts and corruption allegations in regional governments.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump administration faces multiple corruption probes, including 1MDB scandal and healthcare fraud.

themes.title: Reform UK’s electoral surge reshapes UK politics
themes.blurb: Reform UK's unprecedented gains in local elections are transforming the UK's political landscape, challenging both the Conservative and Labour parties. The party's success reflects growing disillusionment with mainstream politics and a shift towards right-wing populism in British politics.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK wins control of multiple councils, reshaping local politics and challenging Labour.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: US media analyzes Reform UK's success as a model for Trump-aligned movements.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian media compares Reform UK's rise to far-right movements in Europe.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Spanish media discusses Reform UK's impact on European far-right politics.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: French media analyzes Reform UK's success as part of a broader European trend.

themes.title: Far-right parties exploit immigration tensions
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe are capitalizing on immigration tensions to gain political traction. From Spain's Vox to France's Rassemblement National and Germany's AfD, these parties are framing immigration as a security threat and advocating for stricter border controls, reflecting a broader transnational trend in right-wing politics.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox links immigration to crime and security threats in Andalusia election campaign.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN clashes with Mbappé over immigration policies and national identity.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD exploits immigration tensions in local and state elections.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK focuses on immigration as a key policy issue in local elections.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Norwegian Progress Party advocates for stricter immigration policies.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian far-right parties link immigration to national security concerns.
